_comment: Packagist requires composer.json at the REPO ROOT (it doesn't follow subdirectory layouts). The PHP source still lives in php/ — local dev uses php/composer.json. KEEP THIS FILE IN SYNC with php/composer.json (paths just prefixed `php/`).
name: oxide/pdf-oxide
description: The fastest PHP PDF library — 0.8ms mean, 5× faster than the industry leaders, 100% pass rate on 3,830 real-world PDFs. Text extraction, Markdown/HTML conversion, and PDF creation over a Rust core via FFI.

suggest.ext-gd: Required for advanced image manipulation features
